title.zh: Suphx：深度强化学习麻将 AI
title.en: Suphx: Mahjong with Deep Reinforcement Learning

summary.zh: 以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进
summary.en: Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning

description.zh: Suphx 将深度强化学习带入日本麻将，这是一种四人不完全信息游戏，包含隐藏牌、随机摸牌、复杂计分和长期风险权衡。它使用监督预训练、自我对弈强化学习、全局奖励预测、oracle guiding 和运行时策略适配，在天凤平台达到超过绝大多数注册段位玩家的水平。
description.en: Suphx brought deep reinforcement learning to Japanese mahjong, a four-player imperfect-information game with hidden tiles, stochastic draws, complex scoring, and long-horizon risk tradeoffs. It used supervised pretraining, self-play reinforcement learning, global reward prediction, oracle guiding, and run-time policy adaptation to reach a level above most ranked Tenhou players.

role.zh: 微软亚洲研究院研究员
微软亚洲研究院研究负责人

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
